uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

university.description: The university the user belongs to.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Ride.title: Ride
Ride.description: Represents a carpooling ride offered by a driver.

driverId.description: The UID of the driver offering the ride.

from.description: The starting location of the ride.

departureTime.description: The departure time of the ride.

totalSeats.description: The total number of seats available in the ride.

availableSeats.description: The number of currently available seats.

status.description: The current status of the ride.

route.description: An array of latitude/longitude objects representing the ride's route.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the ride was created.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a booking request from a passenger for a ride.

rideId.description: The ID of the ride being booked.

driverId.description: The UID of the driver of the ride.

passengerId.description: The UID of the passenger making the booking.

status.description: The status of the booking request.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the booking was created.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profiles for all users.

/universities/{universityId}/rides/{ride.description: Stores all rides, partitioned by university.

/universities/{universityId}/bookings/{b.description: Stores all booking requests, partitioned by university.
